  "artifact_type": "sales_offer_prompt",

  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Generate a sales offer prompt for compliance evidence collection tailored to an enterprise compliance lead in Latin America, using the sovereign lens to ensure regulatory alignment and audit readiness.",
    "Scope": "The prompt must address high-urgency, low-context scenarios with missing details, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must use sovereign_lens framework for Latin American compliance (e.g., LGPD, local data sovereignty).",
      "Must handle incomplete or ambiguous input without hallucinating missing data.",
      "Must produce a structured artifact with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.",
      "Must include validation gates (e.g., compliance check, evidence completeness, audit trail)."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt for compliance evidence.",
      "All SR8-required sections are present and compilable.",
      "Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.",
      "Output is ready for Codex runtime execution."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON",
      "sections": [
        "artifact_type",
        "depth_tier",
        "runtime_target",
        "should_block",
        "blocked_reason",
        "compiled_intent"
      ],
      "compiled_intent_structure": {
        "Objective": "string",
        "Scope": "string",
        "Constraints": "array of strings",
        "Success Criteria": "array of strings",
        "Output Contract": "object with format and sections"
      }
    }
  }
}
